question: প্রতিটি রাজ্যের জন্য এলাকার ধরন অনুযায়ী উপজেলার সংখ্যার একটি বিভাজন প্রদান করুন, যা বর্ণানুক্রমে রাজ্যের নাম অনুসারে এবং তারপর সর্বোচ্চ গণনা অনুসারে সাজানো হবে।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area, 
    COUNT(dsd.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count
FROM 
    dim_state ds
JOIN 
    dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district dsd ON dd.district_id = dsd.district_id
GROUP BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    sub_district_count DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area, 
    COUNT(dsd.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count
FROM 
    dim_state ds
JOIN 
    dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district dsd ON dd.district_id = dsd.district_id
GROUP BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    sub_district_count DESC;

question: ২০২১ সালের জন্য, এলাকার ধরন অনুযায়ী একটি বিভাজন প্রদান করুন যা হিমোগ্লোবিনের মাত্রা ১১-এর নিচে থাকা গর্ভবতী মহিলাদের মোট সংখ্যা এবং পরিচালিত হিমোগ্লোবিন পরীক্ষার গড় সংখ্যা দেখাবে।
gold_sql: SELECT T2.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T1.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11), AVG(T1.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) FROM FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T2.TYPE_OF_AREA
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA, 
    SUM(mt.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) AS total_women_with_hb_less_than_11, 
    AVG(mt.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) AS average_haemoglobin_tests_conducted
FROM 
    FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mt
JOIN 
    DIM_SUB_DISTRICT ds ON mt.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = ds.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_MONTH dm ON mt.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID
WHERE 
    dy.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
GROUP BY 
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA
ORDER BY 
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA, 
    SUM(mt.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) AS total_women_with_hb_less_than_11, 
    AVG(mt.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) AS average_haemoglobin_tests_conducted
FROM 
    FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mt
JOIN 
    DIM_SUB_DISTRICT ds ON mt.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = ds.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_MONTH dm ON mt.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID
WHERE 
    dy.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
GROUP BY 
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA
ORDER BY 
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA;
